title: Server List on Pause Screen
description: This mod adds a button in the pause screen that opens the multiplayer server list.
body:
**This mod adds a Server List button above Disconnect in the pause screen — no need to return to the main menu, if you want to check on your servers.**

Pause Screen
![Pause Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/547ab268d4d58e07a8053d35c00ace48833ff944.png)

Server List
![Server List](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f08adfdc16a4e36f57886d2bff30fdf537cb9f0f.png)
